creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
New md5 checksum for graphics/sketch, version 0.6.0.

Fix: 

It should be noted that I had a problem getting the other programs
required by sketch-0.6.0 due to md5 checksum mismatches.

Would Ted Schundler <tschundler@edgemedia.net> care to follow up on this?--G4lcAe3CJOdrDOKjLk8eYIPXKbTMajSqEWvd6g9E0tDOci0C
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -urN sketch.old/files/md5 sketch/files/md5
diff -urN sketch.old/files/md5 sketch/files/md5
--- sketch.old/files/md5        Wed May 19 07:00:58 1999
+++ sketch/files/md5    Tue Jun 22 15:47:16 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (sketch-0.6.0.tar.gz) = 82641a8575e71c0ea9d23b3fe85c1594
+MD5 (sketch-0.6.0.tar.gz) = b879f91569943b432a9696518ff56a59
